title: Xero & QuickBooks Accounting Firm Leads
description: Find and enrich public accounting firm and advisor profiles from Xero and QuickBooks directories worldwide.

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: Cities, regions, postcodes, or countries to search.

maxResults.title: Maximum leads
maxResults.description: Maximum number of final deduplicated leads. When both Xero and QuickBooks are selected, values below 14 are normalized to a combined-source floor of 14; single-source runs are unchanged.

enrichWebsites.title: Enrich company websites
enrichWebsites.description: Visit public company websites for business contact and qualification data. Keep disabled until directory items and profiles are being returned.

includeRawData.title: Include raw source data
includeRawData.description: Include compact source fields for debugging.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for public directory requests.
